channel.title: Sandbox Bug
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Sandbox Bug" - Sandbox isn't accepting me as a member, even though I've been accepted.

item.title: Re: Sandbox Bug
item.content:encoded: Please check your PMs, I will assist you with this query.

item.title: Re: Sandbox Bug
item.content:encoded: Were you logged in when you attempted to create the page? Alternatively, you may need to join the Sandbox 3 wiki in order to create new pages — that page is found here http://scp-sandbox-3.wikidot.com/system:join

item.title: Sandbox Bug
item.content:encoded: I attempted to access the sandbox to do a draft on an SCP, not to post, just to get some practice in writing one. However, it said the page I'm trying to access does not exist, and brought me to a page that said only "create page". However, when I clicked on it, it said only site administrators, mods, etc. may create a sandbox page. Does anybody know how to fix this?
